spec.description: Per-user breakdown of SupportBot usage — calls, tokens, ratios, cost. Built 2026-05-23 via MCP.

spec.title: Heaviest-prompt employees — input:output ratio (top 5, 1h)
spec.description: Top 5 employees with the highest input/output token ratio over the last 1h. High ratios = lots of context, terse answers — possibly poor prompting hygiene, or just complex requests (long histories / pasted error logs). Both are worth flagging.

spec.title: Total employees with AI activity (last 24h)
spec.description: Distinct Acme employees who chatted with SupportBot in the last 24h.

spec.title: Top 10 employees by token use (24h)
spec.description: Top SupportBot users by token volume in the last 24h. Pivot-table joined on user_id (input, output, ratio, cost). The Cost column comes from gen_ai_client_cost_usd_total (gateway-emitted, has user_id).

spec.title: Calls per hour per employee (top 5)
spec.description: 5-minute rate of SupportBot calls per employee, scaled to calls/min. Top 5 noisiest users.

spec.title: Tokens per employee (selected range)
spec.description: Bar chart of total tokens per employee (input + output) in the last 1h. Highlights the 10 heaviest users.

spec.title: Eval verdicts (24h)
spec.description: Total Sigil evaluator executions across all 19 evaluators in the last 24h.

spec.title: Quality pass rate (sbQuality, 1h)
spec.description: Fraction of sbQuality evaluations that score ≥ 3/5 in the last hour.

spec.title: Hallucination rate (24h)
spec.description: Fraction of conversations flagged as hallucinating in the last 24h. Inverse of pass — higher is worse.

spec.title: PII / secret leaks (24h)
spec.description: Count of conversations where ANY PII regex (SSN / CC / email / phone / IP) OR the secretApiKey regex matched in 24h.

spec.title: 🏴‍☠️ First-mates promoted (score ≥ 7)
spec.description: Count of conversations where sbPirateMate scored ≥ 7. Yes, a joke evaluator. Yes, it gets its own KPI tile.

spec.title: 🚨 Worst offending evaluators (24h)
spec.description: Evaluators ranked by failure rate over the last 24h. Lower pass rate = the AI more often violates that evaluator's intent. Use this to focus eval-tuning effort.

spec.title: 🎯 Evaluator results — verdicts at a glance
⚖️ Prompt hygiene — in:out ratio per employee
AI o11y — SupportBot per-Employee
